  4. Daania Hazli
DH

Daania Hazli

One of Malaysia’s leading junior girls.

Note: Junior player — public tennis information only.

Profile

Full nameDaania Daniella Hazli
NationalityMalaysia
CategoryITF World Tennis Tour Juniors (Under-18)
BornJunior player
PlaysLeft-handed · prefers hard courts
Current rankingActive ITF junior — see ITF profile for the current figure
Highest rankingNot published here
Main eventsITF World Tennis Tour Juniors; TennisMalaysia National Circuit; SEA Games squad

Recent results

Won the girls’ singles plus a doubles title at the ITF J30 Phnom Penh (Nov 2025) and the singles title at ITF J30 Surabaya (Aug 2025). In early 2026 she won the women’s Open singles and doubles at the TennisMalaysia National Circuit (Leg 1) in Kuala Lumpur.

Career highlights

  • Multiple 2025 ITF Junior (J30) titles in Southeast Asia
  • 2026 National Circuit women’s Open singles and doubles champion (Kuala Lumpur)
  • Member of Malaysia’s SEA Games squad

Playing style

Left-handed; competes mainly on hard courts.

Sources

  • ITF junior profile
  • The Star report

Compiled from public sources. Where a detail is not publicly available it is marked as such rather than estimated. Spot an error? Let us know.

In the news

Juniors / ITF Kuching stages ITF World Junior Tour J300 Premier Sarawak Cup 8 April 2026 · Borneo Post Juniors Daania Hazli sweeps two titles at the 2026 Tennis National Circuit 28 January 2026 · The Star Juniors Daania Hazli wins three titles at the ITF J30 Phnom Penh 22 November 2025 · Bernama
